nasb.text: A spirit of justice for him who sits in judgment, A strength to those who repel the onslaught at the gate.

esv.text: and a spirit of justice to him who sits in judgment, and strength to those who turn back the battle at the gate.

cnv.text: 也必作在位上施行審判者公平的心靈， 並作在城門口擊退敵人者的力量。

ccb.text: 祂必使审判官公正断案， 赐力量给守城退敌之人。

csbs.text: 对在位的审判者， 必成为公正的灵； 对城门口击退猛攻的人， 必成为他们的力量。
